headline: PSE&G Applauds FERC Decision Protecting Its Customers From Unfair Transmission Costs
summary: PSE&G announced today that the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) has issued a major decision rejecting a proposed settlement that would have disproportionately allocated transmission costs to customers—delivering a significant win for PSE&G customers. FERC's March 6 order (FERC Order number 20260306-3001) found that the proposed settlement would have disproportionately and unfairly shifted transmission project costs.

headline: PSEG Earns National Recognition for Corporate Citizenship and Community Impact
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group (PSEG) is proud to announce we have been honored with three national distinctions that reflect our focus on the people and communities we serve: recognized as the JUST Capital 2026 Industry Leader for Utilities, ranked among the top ten of America's Most Responsible Companies 2026 by Newsweek and Statista and named one of America's Most Charitable Companies 2026 by Newsweek and Statista.

headline: JPMorgan Increases Price Target on PSEG (PEG)
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Inc. (NYSE:PEG) is one of the 10 best regulated electric stocks to buy according to hedge funds. As of the March 13 closing, consensus sentiment for Public Service Enterprise Group Inc. (NYSE:PEG) remained moderately bullish.
